reviews.comment:
Es una YPF del ACA bien ubicada, y tiene buena atención y servicio...esta pegadita a la costa del Río Salado y una muy linda vista de esa zona...baños en buenas condiciones

(Translated by Google)
It is a well-located YPF in the ACA, and has good attention and service... it is right next to the coast of the Salado River and has a very nice view of that area... bathrooms in good condition
